prompt: A person is sitting on the very edge of a chair, leaning their torso slightly forward. After a few moments of complete stillness, they slowly and heavily begin to lift their head. With a deliberate, ponderous gaze, they scan the surroundings. The movement is slow and smooth; they rotate their head to the side, then gradually tilt it upward toward the ceiling, and finally lower it slowly to look at the ground. Every turn is accompanied by a subtle, weighted twist of the entire torso, expressing a deep sense of gravitational weight and disorientation in a measured pace.
